name: Sesame Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 lb chicken, cut into small pieces
(Or balsamic vinegar, which adds an interesting tang)
2 tsp shredded orange peel (optional, but suggested)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first four ingredients together in a bowl and add the chicken. Turn to coat thoroughly with the mixture.
2. Place the mixture in the refrigerator to marinate for at least an hour.
3. In a wok or large skillet, heat 1 inch of oil over medium-high heat until hot.
4. Add the marinated chicken (a few pieces at a time) and sizzle when it hits the oil. Stir fry until cooked through.
5. If using vegetables, add them in small batches and stir fry until slightly darkened and caramelized.
6. Add water chestnuts and any other desired vegetables, then swirl around until just warm.
7. Transfer to a serving bowl and serve with rice or cellophane noodles.
(Note: If you have previously posted this recipe, please forgive the repetition as it pairs well with the peanut sauce and noodles.)
